name: machine-os-code-graph
description: Blast-radius and dependency-graph tools for your repos. Ask what depends on a file before you change it.
long_description: The code-graph spoke of The Machine OS, packaged for one-click install in Claude Desktop. It walks a workspace you choose, builds a dependency graph, and exposes two read-only tools: blast_radius (the files that depend on a given file, plus the files it depends on) and graph_summary (a quick file/edge count to confirm the repo is analyzable). Read-only and confined to the workspace directory you pick on install.

workspace_dir.title: Workspace root
workspace_dir.description: The repository the code-graph tools may analyze. Analysis is read-only and cannot escape this directory.

tools.name: blast_radius
tools.description: Given a repo-relative file path, return its dependents (files that can break if it changes) and dependencies.

tools.name: graph_summary
tools.description: Return a one-line structural summary of the repo dependency graph (file count, edge count).
